error_signature: workflow fails to resume safely after partial execution
title: Workflow fails to resume after failure
symptom: When a workflow processing large datasets fails, it restarts from the beginning, causing duplicates and skipped records.
root_cause: The workflow lacks state management, leading to a complete restart on failure. Without checkpointing, it cannot track progress, resulting in duplicate processing or skipped records when rerun.
fix_steps: Store the last processed page number in a database after each successful batch.
Use upsert operations in the database to prevent duplicates when writing data.
Implement a mechanism to fetch the last processed page on restart and continue from there.
agent_instruction: Implement checkpointing and idempotent writes in your workflow.
